title: Pulling data from column when creating item in another board/group?
excerpt: Hi. We have a Candidate Database board and an Interviews board. When we create a new item on Interviews, we capture certain information such as Candidate Source and Candidate Owner, data which is stored on the item recor…

posts.author: fredinho (Jim Knott)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi. We have a Candidate Database board and an Interviews board. When we create a new item on Interviews, we capture certain information such as Candidate Source and Candidate Owner, data which is stored on the item record on Candidate Database. Is there a way to pull this information in to the Interviews item record automatically without us having to type it in manually each time?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there. You’ll want to use the connected and mirror columns. ie on the Interviews board have a connected column where you can pick the candidate that’ the interview is tied to. Then you’ll add mirror columns that pull info from the candidate board related to that specific candidate.

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @fredinho

Welcome to this community! AS Desiree mentioned you can do this with connect_boards and mirror columns. If you want your data in you Interviews board in normal (not mirror) column you can also use the app Match Index Column.

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Jim,

Like everyone has suggested - I think Mirror Columns should be sufficient for your use-case.

But if you’re looking to also sync updates + replies, or are looking for a much cleaner approach, you can try the Mirror Item Multiple Boards app.

What You Can Do with Mirror Item -

Add the SAME ITEM ON MULTIPLE BOARDS with live sync and full context

Sync UPDATES + REPLIES in real time for items and subitems

Set up automations like “When status changes to something, mirror item to target board and group”

Create a Master Board with items/subitems from multiple boards

Add a subitem from one board as a main item on another board

Keep your boards clean and connected — no Mirror Columns or Connect Boards needed
